email_auth_verification_preview: Hi {firstName}, confirm your email in one click and start using ShadowWhisper.
email_auth_verification_lead: Click the button below to confirm your email and activate your account. This link is valid for 24 hours.
email_auth_verification_link_intro: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
email_auth_verification_step_before_acti: After confirming, go back to the desktop app and click
email_auth_verification_outro: If you did not request this, you can ignore this email.
email_auth_verification_text_intro: Your ShadowWhisper sign-up is almost ready. Confirm your email to activate your account:
email_auth_verification_text_step: After confirming, go back to the desktop app and click "Verify sign-up" to unlock access.
email_auth_verification_text_expiry: This link is valid for 24 hours. If you did not request this sign-up, you can ignore this message.
email_auth_password_reset_preview: Hi {firstName}, reset your password in one click.
email_auth_password_reset_lead: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new one. This link is valid for 1 hour.
email_auth_password_reset_link_intro: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
email_auth_password_reset_outro: If you did not request this, you can ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.
email_auth_password_reset_text_intro: We received a request to reset your ShadowWhisper account password. Click the link below to create a new one:
email_auth_password_reset_text_expiry: This link is valid for 1 hour. If you did not request this, you can ignore this message. Your password will not be changed.
email_account_welcome_preview: Hi {firstName}, your account is ready. Here's how to get started.
email_account_welcome_lead: Your account is active. Open the desktop app and start dictating; your words will appear wherever your cursor is.
email_account_welcome_tip_1: Press Option+Space to start recording. Press again to stop.
email_account_welcome_tip_2: Your transcriptions are inserted at the cursor position in any app.
email_account_welcome_tip_3: Add skills to automatically transform your dictations (fix grammar, translate, summarize).
email_account_welcome_outro: Questions? Reply to this email anytime.
email_account_password_changed_preview: Hi {firstName}, your ShadowWhisper password was updated.
email_account_password_changed_lead: Your ShadowWhisper password was changed successfully. If you did not make this change, reset your password immediately using the button below.
email_account_password_changed_outro: If you made this change, no action is needed.
email_billing_trial_ending_preview: Hi {firstName}, your trial ends on {endDate}. Here's what happens next.
email_billing_trial_ending_lead: After your trial, you'll be charged {amount}/month on the card ending in {cardLast4}. Cancel anytime before {endDate} to avoid charges.
email_billing_trial_ending_outro: Cancel before {endDate} if you'd rather not continue. No questions asked.
email_billing_sub_confirmed_lead: Your subscription is active. All plan features are unlocked.
email_billing_sub_confirmed_outro: Thanks for subscribing. We're glad to have you.
email_billing_sub_cancelled_preview: Hi {firstName}, your ShadowWhisper subscription has been cancelled.
email_billing_sub_cancelled_lead: You'll keep access to {planName} features until {accessEndDate}. After that, your account returns to the free plan.
email_billing_sub_cancelled_outro: Changed your mind? You can resubscribe anytime.
email_billing_receipt_preview: Hi {firstName}, your payment of {amount} was received.
email_billing_receipt_lead: We received your payment. Here are the details.
email_billing_receipt_outro: This is your payment confirmation. No action needed.
email_billing_payment_failed_preview: Hi {firstName}, we couldn't process your payment.
email_billing_payment_failed_lead: We couldn't charge the card ending in {cardLast4}. Update your payment method to keep your {planName} access.
email_billing_payment_failed_outro: If you need help, reply to this email.
email_billing_usage_threshold_preview: Hi {firstName}, you've used {percentage}% of your monthly allowance.
email_billing_usage_threshold_lead: You've used {used} of {total} {unit} this month. Consider upgrading to avoid interruptions.
email_billing_usage_threshold_outro: Usage resets at the start of each billing cycle.
email_billing_plan_limit_preview: Hi {firstName}, you've used all your monthly allowance on ShadowWhisper.
email_billing_plan_limit_lead: You've used all {total} {unit} included in your {planName} plan this month. Upgrade to continue, or wait until {resetDate}.
